title: Performance Step Up
description: Massive FPS gains. Zero Stutter. Pure Vanilla Gameplay.
body:
![Performance Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ad5403e3a82fed28335e9da760f57469864bb79.png)
**Performance Step-Up** is a performance-focused modpack designed for players who want the best possible FPS and _smoothness_ — especially on low-end and mid-range hardware. No bloat, no QoL mods, just pure optimization.

## Why Performance Step-Up?
Most modpacks bundle dozens of QoL mods that hurt performance all without changing how the game looks or plays. Performance Step-Up cuts straight to what matters :\
🔥 **Maximum FPS**\
⚡ **Faster loading** & _smoother_ rendering\
🖥️ **Reduced stuttering**\
🌐 **Stable in both Singleplayer and Multiplayer**

| Test                | Avg FPS | Min FPS  | Max FPS |
|---------------------|---------|----------|---------|
| Performance Step-Up | 130     | 80       | 300     |
| Minecraft Vanilla   | 50      | 10       | 120     |
| Fabulously Optimized| 70      | 20       | 180     |
| Remarkably Optimized| 100     | 60       | 200     |

## System Setup :
Here’s the system setup I used for this benchmark:

| Component | Specification               |
|-----------|-----------------------------|
| OS        | Microsoft Windows 11 Pro 24H2 |
| CPU       | AMD Ryzen 3 3250U           |
| GPU       | AMD Radeon Vega 3           |
| RAM       | 12 GB                       |

Please test the modpack on your own system, as results may vary depending on your hardware configuration.

## Bug Reports :
Sorry Bug Reports are not available for now.
